name: brand-guidelines-community
description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to any sort of artifact that may benefit from having Anthropic's look-and-feel. Use it when brand colors or style guidelines, visual formatt...
capabilities: Provides exact Anthropic brand color values in hex and RGB formats
Specifies typography guidelines for headings and body text using Poppins and Lora fonts
Defines smart font application rules based on text size and hierarchy
Offers accent color cycling system for visual elements
Includes fallback font recommendations for cross-platform compatibility
Guides color selection based on background context
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Static analysis detected 21 potential issues, all confirmed as false positives after evaluation. The skill contains only documentation with brand color codes and typography guidelines. No executable code, network operations, or external commands present. All findings were pattern-matching errors on Markdown syntax, license text URLs, and benign documentation terms.
valueStatement: Ensure visual consistency across your documents and presentations with Anthropic's official brand identity. This skill provides precise color values, typography specifications, and design guidance for professional-looking artifacts.
userTitle: Apply Anthropic Brand Guidelines to Your Artifacts
limitations: Requires pre-installed Poppins and Lora fonts for optimal results
Only provides brand guidelines, does not automatically apply styling to files
Documentation-only skill with no automated formatting capabilities
Font availability varies across different operating systems

useCases.title: Create branded presentations
useCases.description: Apply Anthropic colors and typography to PowerPoint slides for consistent company branding in client pitches and internal presentations.

useCases.title: Design documentation with brand consistency
useCases.description: Ensure technical documentation, README files, and internal wikis maintain visual consistency with official Anthropic design standards.

useCases.title: Build branded visual assets
useCases.description: Use accurate brand colors and typography when creating diagrams, infographics, and marketing materials that reference Anthropic.

promptTemplates.title: Get brand colors
promptTemplates.prompt: What are the main Anthropic brand colors I should use for my presentation background and text?
promptTemplates.scenario: User needs basic color information for a new presentation

promptTemplates.title: Apply typography rules
promptTemplates.prompt: I'm creating a document in PowerPoint. How should I apply fonts to headings versus body text according to Anthropic guidelines?
promptTemplates.scenario: User needs specific font application guidance

promptTemplates.title: Select accent colors
promptTemplates.prompt: I need to add visual interest to my slide with non-text shapes. Which accent colors from Anthropic palette should I use?
promptTemplates.scenario: User wants to use accent colors appropriately

promptTemplates.title: Handle font fallbacks
promptTemplates.prompt: I don't have Poppins and Lora fonts installed. What fallback fonts should I use for headings and body text?

bestPractices: Always verify font availability before applying typography guidelines to ensure consistent rendering
Use RGB color values when applying colors programmatically for precise brand matching
Reserve accent colors for non-text shapes to maintain visual hierarchy and readability
Apply dark text colors on light backgrounds and light text colors on dark backgrounds for accessibility
antiPatterns: Do not apply brand colors to text without considering background contrast requirements
Avoid mixing Poppins and Lora fonts randomly - follow the heading size guidelines
Never use accent colors for body text as they are intended for shapes and highlights only
Do not assume fonts are installed - always provide fallback options for cross-platform compatibility

faq.question: Do I need to install fonts to use this skill?
faq.answer: For optimal results, pre-install Poppins and Lora fonts in your environment. However, the skill provides automatic fallback to Arial and Georgia if custom fonts are unavailable.

faq.question: Can this skill automatically style my documents?
faq.answer: No, this skill provides brand guidelines and specifications. You must manually apply the colors and fonts to your documents using the provided values.

faq.question: What color format should I use?
faq.answer: The skill provides both hex codes and RGB values. Use hex codes for web design and RGBColor class values when working with python-pptx or similar libraries.

faq.question: Are these the official Anthropic brand guidelines?
faq.answer: This is a community-created skill that references Anthropic brand elements. For official brand assets and guidelines, consult Anthropic's official resources.

faq.question: Can I use these colors for web design?
faq.answer: Yes, the hex color codes work for web design. The RGB values are also provided for applications requiring that format.

faq.question: What if my system doesn't have the recommended fonts?
faq.answer: The skill specifies fallback fonts: use Arial for headings and Georgia for body text when Poppins and Lora are unavailable.
